title: heterotheca adenolepis
intro: Heterotheca adenolepis, also known as greenthread, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with greenthread include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and protection against infections. Greenthread can be consumed as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb, and it is also sometimes used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
